hook.say: Weird Al just refused a "nice pile of money" for AI.
hook.show: Weird Al just refused a "nice pile of money" for AI.

lines.say: The parody legend backed out of a lucrative ad deal at the last minute.
lines.show: The parody legend backed out of a lucrative ad deal at the last minute.

lines.say: He initially agreed to a commercial for business software, per Deadline.
lines.show: He initially agreed to a commercial for business software, per Deadline.

lines.say: A week before shooting, he learned the product was AI-powered.
lines.show: A week before shooting, he learned the product was AI-powered.

lines.say: Yankovic immediately pulled out, stating: "I'm not a fan of AI."
lines.show: Yankovic immediately pulled out, stating: "I'm not a fan of AI."

lines.say: This sets a clear precedent for artists navigating AI endorsements.
lines.show: This sets a clear precedent for artists navigating AI endorsements.

lines.say: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
lines.show: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.

captions.instagram:
Weird Al Yankovic drew a line in the sand, rejecting a major payday for an AI endorsement. He says he's "not a fan" of the tech. This decision sends a strong message to Hollywood. What do you think?

#WeirdAl #AI #HollywoodNews #MusicNews #Entertainment #TheScreenReport #ArtistRights #TechEthics #CelebrityNews
captions.facebook: Weird Al Yankovic turned down a significant offer to endorse an AI company. He pulled out last minute, saying he's simply "not a fan." Do you think more artists should take a stand like this?

pinterest.title: Weird Al Yankovic Rejects Lucrative AI Endorsement Deal
pinterest.description: Parody icon Weird Al Yankovic turned down a "nice pile of money" for an AI ad, stating he's "not a fan." This decision highlights growing artist concerns about AI in entertainment. Get the full story from The Screen Report.

youtube.title: Weird Al Yankovic Rejects HUGE AI Ad Deal! #Shorts
youtube.description: Weird Al Yankovic turned down a lucrative offer to endorse an AI company, saying he's "not a fan." This move makes a statement in the ongoing industry debate over artificial intelligence.

captions.x: Weird Al Yankovic rejected a "nice pile of money" for an AI ad, saying: "I'm not a fan of AI." He pulled out last minute. A clear stance from the parody legend. #WeirdAl #AI

spoken: Weird Al just refused a "nice pile of money" for AI. The parody legend backed out of a lucrative ad deal at the last minute. He initially agreed to a commercial for business software, per Deadline. A week before shooting, he learned the product was AI-powered. Yankovic immediately pulled out, stating: "I'm not a fan of AI." This sets a clear precedent for artists navigating AI endorsements. Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
